root.sql:
select tac.rowno||'.'||sum(1)over(partition BY(budget_id) , (nature) order by tac.budget_id ,tac.sort_order )AS acc_rowno,tac.* from ( select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.budget_id )AS rowno ,tab.* from ( select sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year + 543 as account_year ,(sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year - 1 ) + 543 as account_year_old ,(sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year + 1 ) + 543 as account_year_req ,(case when lag(sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_id,1,null) over(order by sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_id ) = sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_id then 0 else 1 end)as row_memno ,sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_id ,sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_name ,sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.total_budjet --ตั้งไว้
,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ,sc_acc_m_account_master.nature ,sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_budget --ใช้ไป ,sc_acc_m_account_budget.budget_req --ปีการเงินขอตั้ง ,sc_acc_m_account_budget.budget_desc ,sc_acc_m_account_budget.sort_order
from sc_acc_m_account_budget ,sc_acc_m_account_budget_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master where sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_year = sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year and sc_acc_m_account_budget.budget_id = sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id /*WHERE*/ --and sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_year = 2023 --and sc_acc_m_account_budget.branch_id = '01' )tab )tac
